stages.name: Metadata Extraction
stages.summary: Resolved client, matter, and selected local fixture documents.

stages.name: Classification
stages.summary: Classified the packet as a demo commercial contract matter.

stages.name: Specialists
stages.summary: Prepared contract, privacy, compliance, and litigation review lanes.

stages.name: Synthesis
stages.summary: Synthesized vendor renewal findings for attorney review.

stages.name: Report
stages.summary: Generated a generic display output envelope.

humanReview.title: Attorney Review
humanReview.summary: Approve or request changes to the synthesized onboarding findings.

segments.label: Contract Findings
segments.summary: Vendor renewal terms are ready for follow-up review.

segments.label: Privacy Findings
segments.summary: Data-handling terms should be tightened in the next workflow.

outputs.title: Document Onboarding Complete
outputs.content: Completed local demo run for Acme Robotics LLC. The workflow resolved files, classified the matter, routed specialist lanes, captured HITL review, and produced a generic output envelope.
